title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 161.193 - State council on vocational education established by executive order, assigned to department — reports, distribution
text:
161.193.  State council on vocational education established by executive order, assigned to department — reports, distribution. — 1.  As used in this section, the word "council" means the state council on vocational education assigned to the department of elementary and secondary education by executive orders 85-3 and 85-5 in 1985.
  2.  The council shall provide to the department of economic development, the education committees of the house of representatives and the senate, and the appropriations committees of the house of representatives and the senate copies of all reports which the council is required to submit or does submit to the state board of education, the governor, the state job training coordinating council, the secretary of education and the secretary of labor, or any of the above.
(L. 1990 S.B. 470 § 1)
